feature_tested: Role-based Onboarding Wizard & Public Guest Spa Booking
summary: Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). All onboarding wizard and guest booking endpoints working correctly. Frontend: Onboarding wizard visible with step counter, progress bar, Next/Skip buttons. Guest Booking panel opens from Spa & Wellness group with 10 treatment cards. Full 4-step booking flow works: treatment selection → time selection → guest details → confirmation.

endpoints: GET /api/onboarding-wizard/status?user_id=test - Returns show_wizard=true for new user
GET /api/guest-booking/treatments - Returns 10 public treatments (no internal fields)
Treatments have valid price and duration fields
POST /api/guest-booking/book - Creates pending appointment with auto-assigned therapist

verified_elements: Next button advances to next step
Guest Booking option under Spa & Wellness
Step 1: 10 treatment cards with name, category badge, description, price, duration
Step 2: Date input and 22 time slots
Step 3: Full Name, Email, Phone, Room #, Special Requests fields
Step 3: Confirm Booking and Back buttons
Step 4: Treatment, Date, Time, Therapist, Price, Booking ID displayed

critical_code_review_comments: onboarding_guest.py correctly implements role-based tour steps with 7 role configurations
Guest booking correctly auto-assigns therapist based on qualifications and availability
Guest booking creates client record if not exists
Sidebar.tsx OnboardingWizard component properly fetches status and steps from API
GuestBooking/index.tsx implements clean 4-step flow with proper state management
guest-booking panel registered in panel-registry.ts with high priority
seed_data_creation: None - using existing spa treatments, therapists, rooms seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding wizard shows for first-time users in sidebar. Uses user_id='default-user' in dev mode. Guest Booking is under Spa & Wellness group. Full 4-step booking flow: treatment → time → details → confirmation. Booking creates pending appointment with auto-assigned therapist and room. POS/GL/Email integrations remain MOCKED stubs.

mocked_apis.Toast POS: Stub - returns 'connection_ready' message, no actual API calls
mocked_apis.QuickBooks Online: Stub - returns 'connection_ready' message, no actual API calls
mocked_apis.SendGrid: Stub - queues emails locally, no actual delivery
mocked_apis.Resend: Stub - queues emails locally, no actual delivery
